body.title: Error continuation: on_error branch routing from __error__ basket key
body.description: When a step chain sets __error__, execution currently stops. Add on_error field to habit schema: a branch target that fires when __error__ is non-empty at end of chain. Lets programs define recovery paths without wrapping every step in conditional. Also: prim_clear_error() to reset __error__ after handled. This completes the try/catch pattern at the habit level.
